pi_items.source: Task is defective. The file sp500_financials.csv is entirely missing from the repository, and setup_task.ps1 is also missing.
Talon voice framework documentation for Windows user directory paths.
Task is defective. Since the sp500_financials.csv is missing, there are no actual metrics to verify.

privileged_info_summary: Discovered that the task is defective. Critical setup scripts (setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1) and the underlying S&P 500 financials dataset (sp500_financials.csv) are entirely missing from the environment. While the Talon user directory path (C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\finance_tool) is structurally correct for a Windows environment, the absence of data prevents verification of the expected metrics and makes the task impossible to successfully execute.
